provenance.canonical_paper_title: Financial Numeric Extreme Labelling: A Dataset and Benchmarking for XBRL Tagging
notes: Canonical raw release source is a user-provided local FNXL train/dev/test copy.
allLabelCount.csv is authoritative for label inventory.
labels.json is auxiliary only and is used only to resolve the sparse label-id mapping.
consolidated_xbrl_* files are downstream derived artifacts and not the raw benchmark source.
Original released split is archived for provenance only because release-level company/file leakage was confirmed.
provenance.local_source_description: User-provided local FNXL release copy and auxiliary local Data folder; absolute filesystem paths are intentionally omitted from published metadata.

notes: Raw ner_tags behave as sparse positive numeric token labels over a large label-id space.
The observed used positive FNXL ID range is sparse within 1..2799.
Canonical prediction target is sparse (token_index, label_id).
labels.json is auxiliary and not authoritative for the published label vocabulary.

hf_publish.upstream_license_name: Unspecified from local handoff; verify independently before redistribution beyond current workflow
hf_publish.upstream_license_note: Treat conservatively until exact licensing terms are confirmed.
